ContextOverflow.description: Strategy when the LLM context exceeds `Stage::max_context_tokens`.

oneOf.description: Drop oldest non-system messages until under the limit.
Append to an array; creates the array if absent.

PipelineStage.description: Pipeline stage. Routing per stage evaluates in this order: 1. agent failed + `error_next` set → `error_next`. 2. `routing_fn` registered → call it. 3. `default_next` → that stage. 4. otherwise → terminate `Completed`.

default_next.description: Fallback target when no routing function is set or it returns Terminate.

error_next.description: Target stage when the agent fails (checked before `routing_fn`).

has_llm.description: Whether this agent makes LLM calls (default: false — explicit opt-in).

max_context_tokens.description: Maximum estimated tokens allowed in LLM context for this stage. Uses chars/4 heuristic. When exceeded, applies `context_overflow`.

max_visits.description: Per-stage visit limit. Terminates with `MaxStageVisitsExceeded` when reached.

model_role.description: Model role (e.g. "fast", "reasoning") — resolved by the LLM provider.

output_key.description: State field key for this stage's output (defaults to stage name).

prompt_key.description: Prompt template key for this agent. None = deterministic (no LLM call).

response_format.description: Verbatim hint forwarded to the LLM provider for grammar-constrained generation. The kernel does not interpret it.

retry_policy.description: Retry policy for transient agent failures.

routing_fn.description: Name of a registered routing function. Called after agent completion to determine the next stage.

timeout_seconds.description: Per-stage wall-clock timeout in seconds. Agent execution is cancelled if it exceeds this deadline.

RetryPolicy.description: Retry-with-backoff for transient agent failures (Temporal activity retry pattern). Applied before routing to `error_next`; no retry on interrupt requests.

max_retries.description: Maximum retry attempts (0 = no retry, default).

StateField.description: Schema entry for a state field — keyed lookup with a merge strategy.

description: Pipeline shape. Linear/branching/cyclic flows come from per-stage `routing_fn` + `default_next`; no graph topology in the kernel.

stages.description: First stage is the entry point.

state_schema.description: Merge strategies for state accumulation across loop-backs.

title: PipelineConfig
